description: High‑level project overview that defines objectives, scope, governance, key stakeholders, and success criteria for the new Grand Theft Auto game. Serves as the foundational agreement that authorizes the project and aligns executive sponsors with the strategic vision.
steps_to_create: Collect executive sponsor input on vision and objectives.
Define project scope, deliverables, and constraints.
Identify and document key stakeholders and governance structure.
Draft the charter and circulate for review.
Obtain formal sign‑off from the Executive Sponsor and Steering Committee.

document_name: High‑Level Strategic Plan (Technology, World, Procedural, Funding, Narrative, Monetization, Risk)
description: A concise strategy document that synthesizes the decision matrix into a coherent plan. It outlines the chosen levers for each major intervention area, aligns them with business goals, and provides a roadmap for the next phases of development.
steps_to_create: Review the decision matrix and key strategic levers.
Map each lever to its impact on scope, performance, and risk.
Align the strategy with the project charter and funding objectives.
Draft the strategic plan and circulate to stakeholders.
Secure approval from the Executive Sponsor and Steering Committee.

description: Comprehensive catalog of identified risks, including likelihood, severity, owners, mitigation actions, and status updates. Provides a living document for risk monitoring throughout the project lifecycle.
steps_to_create: Identify risks from the risk assessment and decision matrix.
Assess likelihood and impact for each risk.
Assign owners and define mitigation actions.
Document risk status and monitoring plans.
Review and update the register on a regular cadence.

description: Plan that identifies all stakeholders, assesses their influence and interest, and defines tailored engagement strategies, communication schedules, and feedback mechanisms.
steps_to_create: Identify all internal and external stakeholders.
Assess each stakeholder’s influence and interest.
Develop engagement strategies and communication channels.
Create a stakeholder communication calendar.
Review and approve the plan with the Project Manager.

description: Standardized template for agreements with publishers, strategic partners, and government grant bodies. Includes key clauses on deliverables, milestones, intellectual property, and financial terms.
steps_to_create: Define funding sources and expected contributions.
Outline deliverables, milestones, and payment schedules.
Draft legal clauses for IP, confidentiality, and dispute resolution.
Review with Legal Counsel for compliance.
Finalize and circulate for signature.

description: Preliminary Gantt‑style schedule that maps major phases (Concept, Prototype, Production, Test, Launch) and key milestones (Alpha, Beta, Gold Master). Provides a baseline for resource planning and risk monitoring.
steps_to_create: Identify major project phases and deliverables.
Estimate durations and resource requirements.
Sequence activities and identify critical path.
Create a visual timeline and share with stakeholders.
Obtain approval from the Project Manager.

document_name: Baseline Assessment Report – Open‑World Scale & Procedural Generation Capabilities
description: Assessment of the current technical and creative capabilities related to open‑world size, detail, and procedural content generation. Identifies gaps and informs the strategic plan.
responsible_role_type: Technical Lead / AI & Procedural Generation Lead
steps_to_create: Collect internal data on current engine performance and asset pipelines.
Benchmark against industry standards for open‑world scale.
Evaluate existing procedural tools and AI models.
Document gaps, risks, and improvement opportunities.
Review with Technical Lead and Project Manager.

description: Plan that defines the process for managing scope, technology, and stakeholder changes throughout the project lifecycle.
steps_to_create: Define change request submission procedures.
Assign roles for review, approval, and implementation.
Establish impact assessment criteria.
Create communication protocols for change announcements.
Obtain approval from the Steering Committee.

description: Framework that defines key performance indicators, data sources, collection methods, and reporting cadence for tracking progress against strategic objectives.
steps_to_create: Identify strategic objectives and corresponding KPIs.
Define data sources and collection methods.
Set reporting intervals and formats.
Assign owners for data collection and analysis.
Review and approve with Executive Sponsor.
